---
pagetitle: "Sophia Jaffer"
page-layout: custom
section-divs: false
editor: source
sidebar: false
search: false
repo-actions: false
description: |
  Personal writing on nature, music, history, travel, and arts.
listing:
  - id: latest-content
    contents:
      - /nature
      - /music
      - /history
      - /travel
      - /arts
      - "!index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    max-items: 3
    feed: false

  - id: nature
    contents:
      - /nature
      - "!index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    max-items: 3
    feed: false

  - id: music
    contents:
      - /music
      - "!index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    max-items: 3
    feed: false

  - id: history
    contents:
      - /history
      - "!index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    max-items: 3
    feed: false

  - id: travel
    contents:
      - /travel
      - "!index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    max-items: 3
    feed: false

  - id: arts
    contents:
      - /arts
      - "!index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    max-items: 3
    feed: false

toc: false
---

::: {.content-container}
::: {.top-story .purple-background}

::: grid
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-6 .top-story-text}
## Writing on the things that matter

Nature, music, history, travel, and arts — five threads through a life spent paying attention.
:::
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-6 .top-story-text}

[**Explore the latest**](latest-content.qmd)

:::
:::

:::
:::

::: {.header-text}
::: {.content-container}
::: {.header-block}
Welcome to **Sophia Jaffer**'s personal site. Here I write about the things that capture my attention — from the natural world to the concert hall, from ancient ruins to contemporary galleries. These are essays, observations, and notes from a curious life.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.content-container}
::: {.listing-block}
<a href="latest-content.qmd">

## Latest

</a>

::: {#latest-content}
:::

:::
:::

::: {.pullout-text}
::: {.pullout-container}
::: {.pullout-block .black-background}

## The world is full of things worth noticing — and writing is how I notice them.

::: {.button}
[About me](about.qmd)
:::

:::
:::
:::

::: {.content-container}
::: {.listing-block}
<a href="nature/index.qmd">

## Nature

</a>

::: {#nature}
:::

:::
:::

::: {.content-container}
::: {.listing-block}
<a href="music/index.qmd">

## Music

</a>

::: {#music}
:::

:::
:::

::: {.content-container}
::: {.listing-block}
<a href="history/index.qmd">

## History

</a>

::: {#history}
:::

:::
:::

::: {.content-container}
::: {.listing-block}
<a href="travel/index.qmd">

## Travel

</a>

::: {#travel}
:::

:::
:::

::: {.content-container}
::: {.listing-block}
<a href="arts/index.qmd">

## Arts

</a>

::: {#arts}
:::

:::
:::

::: {.footer-text}
::: {.footer-container .black-background}
::: {.footer-block}
::: grid

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
### Sections
[Nature](nature/index.qmd)\
[Music](music/index.qmd)\
[History](history/index.qmd)\
[Travel](travel/index.qmd)\
[Arts](arts/index.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
### About
[Who I am](about.qmd)\
[All posts](latest-content.qmd)
:::

:::
:::
:::
:::
